Keep the global LCDU distribution shape unchanged while applying guarded segment overrides only where needed. Interpret this response through the round1 latent response program family. Keep rank repair and distribution-shape stabilization jointly coherent. Interpret this candidate through the finite route-combo coverage program. Combo: R3-C latent + prototype hybrid. Variant: axis_focus_bridge. Focus the route combination on the persistent axis-level weaknesses.
